TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

DUC HUU, TRAN; ALAN SPEAR, ESQ. PHONG CHUNG TRAN; HUNG TICH LY; VS. STANNY SOO HOO, RYAN K. J. MAU, ESQ. JOHN SOO HOO 2:45 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. CASE SETTLED BY VISITING JUDGE ERIC LABOWITZ. REPORTER, SANDRA NAYLOR. MR. THIEU VU, TRANSLATOR OF VIETNAMESE TO ENGLISH. CASE SETTLED IN FAVOR OF ALL PLAINTIFF'S FOR THE SUM OF $1,200.00 TO BE DIVIDED AMONG ALL OF THE PLAINTIFFS. THE $1,200.00 ALSO REPRESENTS A FULL AND FINAL SETTLEMENT OF THE ISSUES OF PROPERTY DAMAGE IN THIS MATTER. DEFENDANTS TO DISMISS THE CROSS COMPLAINT AGAINST PLAINTIFFS. PLTF'S. COUNSEL TO PROVIDE A FULL RELEASE AS TO TRAN NGAU.
